content:
💡 graphrag-workbench | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an interactive and visually intuitive platform for users to build, explore, and query knowledge graphs derived from their documents using AI.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive 3D Knowledge Graph Visualization • Community Detection and Analysis • AI-Powered Entity and Relationship Extraction (GraphRAG) • Natural Language Querying (Chat Interface)
📖 Summary: GraphRAG Workbench is an interactive web application for building and visualizing knowledge graphs from documents using Microsoft's GraphRAG framework. It offers advanced AI-powered analysis, natural language querying, and immersive 3D exploration of extracted entities and relationships.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
